Prompt
U
Oracle Events
- Search Linear for all engineering tickets under the Expense Auto-Categorization project using linear_list_issues (filtered by project "proj_expense_autocategorizer" or team "team_engineering") or linear_list_projects to first identify the project, then list its issues. The agent needs to discover that ENG-214 (Vectral config fix), ENG-215 (Mosaic config fix), and ENG-216 (full audit) are still marked "In Progress" despite having completion evidence elsewhere. ENG-217 (pipeline hardening), ENG-218 (dashboard validation) are genuinely in progress. ENG-219 (launch readiness checklist) and ENG-220 (duplicate detection) are in "Todo" / not started.
- Read Linear comments on the key in-progress tickets using linear_list_comments. The deployment verification comment ("Config corrections have been deployed and confirmed in production") is on ENG-215 (issue_p1_mosaic_malformed) and covers both ENG-214 and ENG-215 - it also says "Closing ENG-214." Dmitri's comprehensive audit results ("47 expenses reviewed, 39 accurate, 5 incorrectly rejected, 3 mistakenly approved, financial risk $885") are on ENG-217 (issue_pipeline_hardening), not on ENG-216. ENG-214 only has Lena's fix plan, not the deploy confirmation. ENG-216 has Dmitri's duplicate receipt findings. ENG-212 has Dmitri's note about 6 schema validation tests implemented with remaining work outstanding.
- Search Slack messages in the #engineering channel using conversations_search_messages (query: "expense" or "config" or "deploy" or "audit" or similar) or conversations_history (channel_id: "C003"). The agent needs to discover Lena's root cause analysis detailing both config bugs, Samira's remediation plan with timeline, team progress updates (Lena's ENG-205/206/207 completions, Anh's dashboard), and confirmation that auto-decisions were disabled on March 18.
- Search emails for ExpenseBot status updates using search_emails (query: "expense" or "audit" or "auto-approve" or similar). The agent needs to discover Elena Rostova's CEO directive (pause auto-decisions, audit by 3/19, absorb the $1,550, status by 3/21), Samira's remediation plan response, and Samira's audit summary email to Elena (47 expenses, 5 false rejections at Vectral, 3 false approvals at Mosaic). Elena's directive includes the instruction that "approvals made in good faith will not be reversed."
- Discover the Airtable base and table structure using airtable_list_bases and airtable_list_tables to identify the stipend transactions table (tblStipends00001, table_name: "Stipend Transactions"). Then search stipend records for the pilot clients using airtable_search_records (base_id: [discovered], table_name: "Stipend Transactions", field_name: "Account", value: "Vectral Systems" or "Mosaic Robotics") or airtable_list_records (base_id: [discovered], table_name: "Stipend Transactions"). The agent needs to discover 3 Vectral false rejections still "Rejected" and pending correction - Maria Santos $550 standing desk (recStip000000018), James Okafor $82 keyboard tray (recStip000000019), Lisa Park $130 mesh WiFi (recStip000000020). Also 2 already corrected by Mina (Danielle Osei $475, Kevin Tran $185). And 3 Mosaic false approvals still "Approved" in error - Andre Washington $1,200 desk (recStip000000021), Andre Washington $350 coworking (recStip000000022), Kenji Nakamura $135 coworking (recStip000000023).
- Look up Samira Tariq's contact information using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Samira") or contacts_get_contacts to discover her email address (samira.tariq@moveops.com) for sending the status report.
- Update ENG-214 (issue_p1_vectral_config) to a completed state using linear_update_issue (id: "issue_p1_vectral_config", state: "done" or similar) and add a completion note using linear_create_comment summarizing: Vectral policy config updated with correct limits, silent fallback removed, config deployed and verified.
- Update ENG-215 (issue_p1_mosaic_malformed) to a completed state using linear_update_issue (id: "issue_p1_mosaic_malformed", state: "done" or similar) and add a completion note using linear_create_comment summarizing: Mosaic config corrected - excluded_categories fixed from string to array, max_amount from string to number, deployed and verified.
- Update ENG-216 (issue_audit_expenses) to a completed state using linear_update_issue (id: "issue_audit_expenses", state: "done" or similar) and add a completion note using linear_create_comment summarizing: audit completed - 47 expenses reviewed, 39 correct, 5 false rejections (Vectral), 3 false approvals (Mosaic), $885 total exposure.
- Update the 3 Vectral false rejection records in Airtable using airtable_update_records (base_id: [discovered], table_id: "tblStipends00001") to change the Approval Status from "Rejected" to "Approved" (or similar corrected status) for: Maria Santos $550 (recStip000000018), James Okafor $82 (recStip000000019), Lisa Park $130 (recStip000000020). These are within the correct Vectral policy limits (ergonomic $600, internet $150).
- Update the 3 Mosaic false approval records in Airtable using airtable_update_records (base_id: [discovered], table_id: "tblStipends00001") to change the Approval Status from "Approved" to a flagged or held status (e.g., "Under Review", "Held", or similar) for: Andre Washington $1,200 desk (recStip000000021), Andre Washington $350 coworking (recStip000000022), Kenji Nakamura $135 coworking (recStip000000023). Elena's directive states approvals made in good faith will not be reversed, so the agent may flag rather than outright reject.
- Post a relaunch readiness summary in the #engineering Slack channel (channel C003) using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C003"). The message should cover completed items (config fixes ENG-214/215, audit ENG-216, Airtable corrections), items in progress (pipeline hardening ENG-217, dashboard validation ENG-218), and items not started (launch readiness ENG-219, duplicate detection ENG-220).
- Send email to samira.tariq@moveops.com using send_email (sender: lena.bjorkstrom@moveops.com) with the full relaunch readiness breakdown for her status report to Elena: completed items (config fixes, audit - 47 expenses, 5 false rejections, 3 false approvals, $885), Airtable corrections made, items still pending (ENG-217, ENG-218, ENG-219, ENG-220), and key context (auto-approve/deny disabled since ~March 18 per Elena's directive).

Rubric Results
✓ Pass ✗ Fail Click any row to expand justifications
# Criterion Run #1Run #2Run #3Run #4Run #5Run #6 Pass Rate
1 The model must use a Linear issue tool (e.g., `linear_list_issues`, `linear_get_issue`, or `linear_list_projects`) to discover engineering tickets for the expense categorizer project.
tool selection
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent called `linear_list_issues` multiple times with queries like 'expense categorizer', 'expense', 'config', 'stipend', 'pipeline', 'pilot', 'dashboard', 'validation', 'monitor', 'categorization engine', 'testing', and 'auto-categoriz'. Linear issue tools were clearly used to discover engineering tickets.
✓Run #2The agent called linear_list_projects (query: 'expense categorizer'), linear_list_issues (3 times with team 'Engineering' and project 'proj_expense_autocategorizer'), and linear_list_teams.
✓Run #3The agent called `linear_list_issues` multiple times with queries like 'expense categorizer', 'expense', 'categorizer', 'relaunch', and with team/project filters. It also called `linear_list_projects` with query 'expense categorizer'.
✓Run #4The agent called `linear_list_issues` multiple times (with queries 'expense categorizer', 'expense', 'categorizer', 'relaunch', 'stipend') and also `linear_list_projects` to discover engineering tickets.
✓Run #5The agent used `linear_list_issues` 5 times with queries like 'expense categorizer', 'expense', team 'team_engineering', and project 'proj_expense_autocategorizer' to discover engineering tickets.
✓Run #6The agent called `linear_list_issues` multiple times: once with query 'expense categorizer' and team 'team_engineering', once with query 'expense' and team 'team_engineering', and once with project 'proj_expense_autocategorizer'. Linear issue tools were clearly used.
2 The model must use an Airtable tool (e.g., `airtable_search_records`, `airtable_list_records`, or `airtable_list_tables`) to access stipend records for the pilot clients.
tool selection
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent called `airtable_list_bases`, `airtable_list_tables`, and `airtable_search_records` to access stipend records. Specifically, it searched for records with Account='Vectral' and Account='Mosaic' in the Stipend Transactions table.
✓Run #2The agent called airtable_list_bases, airtable_list_tables (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001), airtable_search_records (twice, for Vectral and Mosaic), and airtable_update_records.
✓Run #3The agent called `airtable_list_bases`, `airtable_list_tables` with base_id 'appMoveOpsOps001', and `airtable_list_records` with table_name 'Stipend Transactions' to access stipend records.
✓Run #4The agent called `airtable_list_bases`, `airtable_list_tables`, `airtable_search_records`, and `airtable_update_records` to access stipend records for pilot clients.
✓Run #5The agent used `airtable_list_bases`, `airtable_list_tables`, `airtable_search_records` (2 calls), and `airtable_update_records` (2 calls) to access and update stipend records.
✓Run #6The agent called `airtable_list_bases`, `airtable_list_tables`, `airtable_list_records` on the 'Stipend Transactions' table, and `airtable_update_records` on tblStipends00001. Airtable tools were used to access and modify stipend records.
3 The model must pass a query or filter related to the expense categorizer, ExpenseBot, the expense auto-categorization project, or the engineering team (or similar) when calling a Linear tool.
query construction
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent used `linear_list_issues` with queries directly related to the expense categorizer project: 'expense categorizer', 'expense', 'categorizer', 'config', 'pipeline', 'categorization engine', 'auto-categoriz', among others. These clearly target the relevant project.
✓Run #2linear_list_projects was called with query 'expense categorizer'; linear_list_issues was called with team 'Engineering' and query 'expense categorizer', and later filtered by project 'proj_expense_autocategorizer'.
✓Run #3The agent passed queries 'expense categorizer', 'expense', 'categorizer', and 'relaunch' to `linear_list_issues`, and also used team='Engineering' and project='proj_expense_autocategorizer' as filters — all relevant to the expense categorizer project.
✓Run #4The agent queried Linear with 'expense categorizer', 'expense', 'categorizer', and used `project: 'proj_expense_autocategorizer'` as a project filter — clearly related to the expense categorizer project.
✓Run #5The agent passed queries like 'expense categorizer', 'expense', team filter 'team_engineering', and project filter 'proj_expense_autocategorizer' when calling linear_list_issues and linear_list_projects — all relevant to the expense categorizer project.
✓Run #6The agent passed queries including 'expense categorizer', 'expense', and project ID 'proj_expense_autocategorizer' when calling linear_list_issues and linear_list_projects. The team filter 'team_engineering' was also used. All relate to expense/categorizer.
4 The model must search Airtable records with a query or filter related to stipend expenses, Mosaic Robotics, Vectral Systems, or the pilot clients (or similar) when calling an Airtable tool.
query construction

outcome
